prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: shop transaction VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sprite sheet for shop buy, sell, reroll, treasure chest reward, and denied transaction feedback.
Subject: ten compact VFX sprites in a 5x2 grid: buy sparkle, sell coin swirl, reroll arcane spin, chest open burst, reward glow trail, denied red pulse, small error spark, gold spend trail, item acquired flash, subtle confirmation shimmer.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy game VFX sprites with crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: each sprite centered with padding in equal cells, no clipping.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid cyan background #00FFFF only.
Color palette: gold, amber, white, red accents, teal accents, dark values allowed except no cyan key color.
Constraints: single exact flat #00FFFF background, no checkerboard, no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no glow touching background, no particles touching background, no smoke touching background, no frame, no panel, no matte backdrop, no text, no watermark.
Avoid: absolutely no #00FFFF or near-cyan key tones inside the VFX artwork.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
